summary: The Nasdaq Composite fell again today, but blockbuster earnings from Micron Technology could offer a boost tomorrow. The Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 182 points, or 0.4%. The iShares Semiconductor exchange-traded fund, or SOXX, rallied about 2.5% off its intraday low to finish the day down just 0.1%.
content: The Nasdaq Composite fell again today, but blockbuster earnings from Micron Technology could offer a boost tomorrow. The Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 182 points, or 0.4%. The iShares Semiconductor exchange-traded fund, or SOXX, rallied about 2.5% off its intraday low to finish the day down just 0.1%.
chineseTitle: 回顾与前瞻：道琼斯指数辩论
chineseSummary: 纳斯达克综合指数今天再次下跌，但美光科技的巨额盈利可能会在明天带来提振。道琼斯工业平均指数上涨 182 点，涨幅为 0.4%。 iShares Semiconductor 交易所交易基金 (SOXX) 较盘中低点上涨约 2.5%，收盘时仅下跌 0.1%。
chineseContent: 纳斯达克综合指数今天再次下跌，但美光科技的巨额盈利可能会在明天带来提振。道琼斯工业平均指数上涨 182 点，涨幅为 0.4%。 iShares Semiconductor 交易所交易基金 (SOXX) 较盘中低点上涨约 2.5%，收盘时仅下跌 0.1%。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
